ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 24, 25/26) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is intended for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., T-Shirt, Jeans) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Europe, Italy) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region (e.g., EUR/FR, IT) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being converted */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the size is being converted */,
  "conversion_size" INTEGER /* Converted size for the region */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor if a direct size mapping is not available */,
  "conversion_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or explanations for the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the clothing item */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the item is being sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level that triggers a reorder */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., T-Shirt, Jeans) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit (SKU) for the product size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, inventory manager, sales analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
